title: True Herobrine
description: Adds Herobrine, but in a non-destructive way.
body:
|![TRUE HEROBRINE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/pY1lnc0y/images/020b37becb49935b14dc8343fd2a82b1b7a1dc92.png)|
|:-:|
|[![PATREON](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/5734cca1afdce0361bf51525d192d857e4ee5255.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Crumbslord)     [![TWITTER](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/3258940f91415129514d21e643c3ecbed11f54aa.png)](https://twitter.com/CrumbsLord)    [![CURSEFORGE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/534277007517bb3af8a2cdd14b49d1fe3d67e2ee.png)](https://curseforge.com/members/lord_of_crumbs)     [![MODRINTH](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/d6ef08c353be7e06bf25284aadf17f296f81e85e.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Lord_Of_Crumbs)|

![INFO](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/pY1lnc0y/images/b1eab6a9d2ccee1b7b69d4d2dc04e4b6f597156b.png)


 
This mod's goal is to be a Herobrine mod thats true to the legend.


He's not destroying the world, he's not murdering you, its no half-assed boss fight....

He's just watching.... always....



![---](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/pY1lnc0y/images/a9079cc1ce94fcd2f8c2ea41823e06d1d1176fc6.png)

 

Just Herobrine,

He can spawn semi rarely and just stands there and watches you for 2 minutes (CONFIGURABLE in 1.1+) or until you get close.

When you get within 25 blocks of him, he vanishes. (CONFIGURABLE in 1.1+)

Spawns above y60 for higher chances of seeing him (CONFIGURABLE in 1.1+)

There's also a config (1.1+) to only let Herobrine spawn in the Overworld. (On by default)

----------

FAQ:

Q: Is this client side?
A: The mod is required to be on both client and server

Q: Can I use this in a modpack
A: Yes

Q: Fabric port?
A: Not planned

Q: Backport?
A: Prob not

Q: Forward port?
A: If its a main version maybe

Q: Will you add more features?
A: No, all that this mod is supposed to be is already in it (I might add more to configs in the future, idk)

Q: Does herobrine actually spawn?
A: Yes, but he is rare (less rare at night, but still rare)
